title: Core Lithium Sells Stockpile to Glencore, Eyes Finniss Restart
description: Core Lithium Ltd. has sold a stockpile of ore from its idled Finniss mine in Australia to Glencore Plc., raising cash to support a potential restart of the project.
content: Core Lithium Ltd. has sold a stockpile of ore from its idled Finniss mine in Australia to Glencore Plc., raising cash to support a potential restart of the project.
